name: agent-harness-demo
description: Three-stage demo of the CLI agent harness: opencode drafts, claude reviews, codex finalizes

agent.prompt: Write a short, structured outline (5-7 bullet points) for a blog post titled 'What an Agent Harness Is'. When the outline is ready, save it as a POP artifact named 'draft.md' by calling the write_artifact tool with name='draft.md' and the outline as content. Reply with a one-line confirmation.

Read the artifact named 'draft.md' using the read_artifact tool. Tighten the wording, fix any gaps, and expand each bullet into one clear sentence. Save the result as a POP artifact named 'reviewed.md' by calling write_artifact with name='reviewed.md'. Reply with a one-line summary of what you changed.

Read the artifact named 'reviewed.md' using the read_artifact tool. Format it as a finished Markdown document with a title and section headers. Save it as a POP artifact named 'final.md' by calling write_artifact with name='final.md'. Reply with a one-line confirmation.
